pullRequest.title: Generalize Task Count in README for Better Future Accuracy
pullRequest.body:
This PR updates the number of tasks mentioned in the README for Jarvis (fixes #1237).
Instead of using a fixed number like "20", it now uses a more flexible format like "15+", which stays accurate even if more tasks or plugins are added in the future.

This ensures the documentation remains valid and doesn't require frequent updates as the project evolves.
